Class TimePrecision

java.lang.Object
org.jscience.core.util.ExtensibleEnum
org.jscience.social.history.time.TimePrecision
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<ExtensibleEnum>
public class TimePrecision extends ExtensibleEnum
Precision levels for temporal data in historical contexts. Modernized to be an extensible enumeration.
Since:
1.0
Author:
Silvere Martin-Michiellot, Gemini AI (Google DeepMind)
